Name: FTickFunction
Description: Abstract Base class for all tick functions.

Variables.Name: TickGroup
EndTickGroup
Variables.Description:
Defines the tick group that this tick function must finish in. These groups determine the relative order of when objects tick during a frame update.
	 
	  @see ETickingGroup

Variables.Name: bTickEvenWhenPaused
Variables.Description: Bool indicating that this function should execute even if the game is paused. Pause ticks are very limited in capabilities.

Variables.Name: bCanEverTick
Variables.Description: If false, this tick function will never be registered and will never tick. Only settable in defaults.

Variables.Name: bStartWithTickEnabled
Variables.Description: If true, this tick function will start enabled, but can be disabled later on.

Variables.Name: bAllowTickOnDedicatedServer
Variables.Description: If we allow this tick to run on a dedicated server

Variables.Name: bPureLogicTick
Variables.Description: Pure logic tick group that is actually tick in game thread,  don't need to queue tick and task graph system

Variables.Name: bAllowDynamicSchedule
Variables.Description: Whether dynamic scheduling is allowed for this tick function

Variables.Name: TickInterval
Variables.Description: The frequency in seconds at which this tick function will be executed.  If less than or equal to 0 then it will tick every frame
